overall.description: A cinematic exploration of a formal estate garden in Red Dead Redemption 2, featuring a central fountain with classical bronze statues, manicured hedges, and stone pergolas. The camera moves through the garden revealing the landscape, then retreats as characters appear in the foreground before exiting through a colonnade.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a formal estate garden with manicured hedges and classical statues on pedestals. The morning sun illuminates the scene as the camera progresses along a brick pathway, revealing a central fountain courtyard ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: central fountain courtyard with bronze statue

events.description: camera moves into position where the fountain statue is silhouetted against the bright morning sun
camera slows and begins moving backward away from the fountain

agents.ego_description: pausing at the central fountain to view the bronze statue silhouetted against the bright sun

entered.detail: tall bronze statue of a figure standing on an ornate fountain base
calm water pool reflecting the statue and surrounding architecture

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the central fountain featuring a prominent bronze statue silhouetted against the morning sun. The reflecting pool mirrors the statue and the classical temple facade behind it. The camera lingers here before beginning to retreat.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden entrance with characters gathered near terracotta urns

events.description: characters appear in the foreground as the camera retreats from the fountain

agents.ego_description: moving backward away from the fountain, revealing characters standing guard in the garden entrance

standing guard near the pathway entrance

tall narrow evergreen trees lining the garden entrance

segments.scene_description: As the camera retreats from the fountain, characters appear in the foreground standing near large terracotta urns. The fountain becomes smaller in the distance while tall cypress trees frame the garden entrance. The characters appear to be guarding or observing the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone colonnade entrance looking out to the garden

events.description: camera passes under the stone colonnade into the covered entrance area

agents.ego_description: retreating through the stone colonnade, leaving the open garden courtyard behind

entered.detail: stone columns and archway forming a covered entrance to the garden

segments.scene_description: The camera moves backward through a stone colonnade, transitioning from the open garden to a covered entrance. The garden view becomes framed by the stone archway, with the distant fountain visible through the columns. Shadows from the colonnade create a contrast with the bright exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that glides through a sunlit formal estate garden before retreating into the shadows of a stone colonnade. It begins by progressing along a brick pathway lined with manicured hedges and classical statues, moving steadily toward a central fountain courtyard. As the camera reaches the center, the scene focuses on a bronze statue silhouetted against the morning sun, its reflection shimmering in a pool before the temple facade. The camera then begins to retreat, revealing characters standing guard near large terracotta urns as tall cypress trees frame the receding view of the fountain. Finally, the movement pulls back through a stone colonnade, transitioning from the bright open garden to a covered entrance where the distant landscape is framed by contrasting shadows and stone archways.
